reviews.comment:
Es un lugar con muchos años y muy buen servicio, siempre atienden bien. Pero aveces se hace una cola de media cuadra en segunda fila de cabildo por culpa del metrobus

(Translated by Google)
It's a well-established place with excellent service; they always treat you well. However, sometimes the line stretches half a block in the second lane of Cabildo Avenue because of the Metrobus.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXZ3FEdTR3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Voy seguido a cargar nafta,y soy socio de A.C.A.,esta vez fui a comprar un LIMPIAINYECTORES,no me dieron la factura...eso no va...ojo..

(Translated by Google)
I often go to fill up with gas, and I'm a member of A.C.A. This time I went to buy fuel injector cleaner, they didn't give me a receipt...that's not right...be careful..
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXN0ktTXJRRRAB

reviews.comment:
La atención correcta y bien. No ofrecen limpiar parabrisas. La distribución en los expendedores es algo injusta

(Translated by Google)
The service was good and satisfactory. They don't offer windshield cleaning. The distribution at the pumps is somewhat unfair.

reviews.comment:
Cómo siempre una gran máquina de generar ganancias y de exprimir a los empleados. Un cáncer más de nuestro país: al servicio de la ganancia de los políticos de turno y bajo las órdenes de una multinacional piraña ....

(Translated by Google)
As always, a huge profit-making machine that exploits its employees. Just another cancer in our country: at the service of the politicians in power and under the orders of a predatory multinational corporation....
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXbUs2UlVBEAE
